Document:
# Space Stories - Colonial Marines Game Rules
## Recent Changes Please refer to the relevant sections for full details. - All rules updated!
## Admin Decisions are Final - Rules are applied according to their intent. It is impossible to list every example of a rule violation, so enforcement depends on the administrator's interpretation of the rule's meaning. - At their discretion, administrators may address rule violations with in-character consequences. This does not apply to zero-tolerance rules. - You may submit a complaint to Senior Staff if you feel a decision was incorrect.
## General Information Disconnecting or ignoring/refusing admin ahelp will result in a ban appeal-only. This is to prevent malicious players from evading punishment. If you have to leave urgently, inform us and this will be taken into account during your appeal.
All rules listed below are in effect at all times, including between rounds.
## Core Rules These are the core rules of Space Stories - Colonial Marines. Click on them for more detailed information. - [textlink="Rule 0: Community Expectations" link="StoriesENGCommunityExpectations"] - [textlink="Rule 1: Griefing" link="StoriesENGGrief"] - [textlink="Rule 2: Roleplaying" link="StoriesENGRolePlay"] - [textlink="Rule 3: Metagaming and Metacommunication" link="StoriesENGMetagamingMetacommunication"] - [textlink="Rule 4: ERP" link="StoriesENGERP"] - [textlink="Rule 5: Bug Exploitation and Foul Play" link="StoriesENGBuggingFoulPlay"] - [textlink="Rule 6: Ban Evasion and Multi-accounting" link="StoriesENGBypassBlockingMultiAccounts"] - [textlink="Rule 7: Play Your Role" link="StoriesENGPlayYourRole"] - [textlink="Rule 8: Character Names" link="StoriesENGCharacterNames"] - [textlink="Rule 9: Use of Lethal Force" link="StoriesENGUseOfLethalForce"] - [textlink="Rule 10: Military Law and Mutinies" link="StoriesENGMilitaryLawMutinies"]
